# Psalms 33

## Verses (22)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Be glad in the Lord, O doers of righteousness; for praise is beautiful for the upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Give praise to the Lord on the corded instrument; make melody to him with instruments of music. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Make a new song to him; playing expertly with a loud noise. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For the word of the Lord is upright, and all his works are certain. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | His delight is in righteousness and wisdom; the earth is full of the mercy of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | By the word of the Lord were the heavens made; and all the army of heaven by the breath of his mouth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He makes the waters of the sea come together in a mass; he keeps the deep seas in store-houses. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Let the earth be full of the fear of the Lord; let all the people of the world be in holy fear of him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | For he gave the word, and it was done; by his order it was fixed for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The Lord undoes the designs of the nations; he makes the thoughts of the peoples without effect. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The Lord's purpose is eternal, the designs of his heart go on through all the generations of man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Happy is the nation whose God is the Lord; and the people whom he has taken for his heritage. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | The Lord is looking down from heaven; he sees all the sons of men; | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | From his house he keeps watch on all who are living on the earth; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | He makes all their hearts; their works are clear to him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | A king's salvation is not in the power of his army; a strong man does not get free by his great strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | A horse is a false hope; his great power will not make any man free from danger. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | See, the eye of the Lord is on those in whose hearts is the fear of him, on those whose hope is in his mercy; | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | To keep their souls from death; and to keep them living in time of need. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Our souls are waiting for the Lord; he is our help and our salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | For in him our hearts have joy; in his holy name is our hope. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Let your mercy be on us, O Lord, as we are waiting for you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
